generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively when they spot threats. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when we wait for perfect evidence. Our security professionals know what's needed - we should trust their expertise. #NationalSecurity #Counterterrorism
